purpose: Reusable animation capability catalog for gameplay art pack selection and runtime integration.

integration_notes: Use walk1 and walk2 as alternating leg frames for movement.
Use action1 and action2 as attack windup and action poses.
Flip horizontally when velocity or target direction changes.
Use p1_walk, p2_walk, or p3_walk PNG frame folders for advanced locomotion.
Use enemy fly, bite, hit, and dead poses when available.
Drive walk frames by traveled distance to avoid foot sliding.
Rotate characters toward movement or attack direction.
Use hold, gun, machine, and reload poses for combat state changes.
Do not use this pack alone when true leg-run animation is required.
Rotate turrets or projectiles toward target vectors.
Use impact sprites or effects for hit feedback.
Use with a character animation pack when humanoid motion is required.

runtime_rules: A primary humanoid or creature should not slide as one static bitmap when moving.
Running or walking should use alternating leg or body frames when source frames exist.
Attack should use windup and action pose changes at minimum.
Top-down assets must rotate or select direction frames to match velocity or attack vector.
Side-view assets must flip or select left/right frames to match horizontal movement.
